Errores.PermisoDenegado: You do not have permission to perform this operation.
Errores.CuentaInactiva: The account is inactive. Contact the Administrator.
Errores.CuentaBloqueada: The account is locked. Contact the Administrator.
Errores.CuentaBloqueadaIntentos: The account was locked due to too many failed attempts.
Errores.SesionActivaExistente: Valid credentials, but there is already an active session in the system.
Errores.NoHaySesionParaReLogin: There is no active session for Re-Login.
Errores.NoHaySesionParaCerrar: There is no active session to close.
Errores.DebeSeleccionarUsuarioDesbloquea: You must select a user to unlock.
Errores.UsuarioNoBloqueado: The selected user is not locked.
Errores.DebeSeleccionarUsuarioModificar: You must select a user to edit.
Errores.DebeIngresarClaveActual: You must enter the current password.
Errores.DebeIngresarNuevaClave: You must enter the new password.
Errores.DebeConfirmarNuevaClave: You must confirm the new password.
Errores.ClavesNoCoinciden: The new password and confirmation do not match.
Errores.ClaveInsegura: The new password must have at least 8 characters, one uppercase letter and one number.
Errores.ClaveIgualAnterior: The new password cannot be the same as the current one.
Errores.CamposObligatorios: You must fill in all required fields.
Errores.NombreInvalido: The first name can only contain letters and must be between 2 and 50 characters.
Errores.ApellidoInvalido: The last name can only contain letters and must be between 2 and 50 characters.
Errores.DniInvalido: You must enter a valid ID number.
Errores.EmailInvalido: The email format is not valid.
Errores.NombreUsuarioInvalido: The username must be between 4 and 30 characters and can only contain letters, numbers, dot, hyphen or underscore.
Errores.DniYaRegistrado: The ID number is already registered.
Errores.EmailYaRegistradoOtroUsuario: The email is already registered by another user.
Errores.DniYaRegistradoOtroUsuario: The ID number is already registered by another user.
Errores.NombreUsuarioYaRegistradoOtroUsu: The username is already registered by another user.
Errores.IdiomaPorDefectoNoEncontrado: Default language (ES) was not found in the database.
Errores.IdiomaIgualActual: The selected language is already the current language.
Errores.RBAC.NombreFamiliaYaExiste: A Family with that name already exists.
Errores.RBAC.NombreRolYaExiste: A Role with that name already exists.
Errores.RBAC.ComposicionVacia: You must assign at least one Permission or Family to the composition.
Errores.RBAC.FamiliaNoEncontrada: The specified Family was not found.
Errores.RBAC.RolNoEncontrado: The specified Role was not found.
Errores.RBAC.DebeSeleccionarRol: You must select a Role for the user.
Errores.RBAC.CicloIndirecto: Cycle detected: Family '{0}' already contains Family '{1}'. A loop cannot be created.
Errores.RBAC.PermisoDuplicado: Permission '{0}' is already included through {1}; it cannot also be added through {2}.
Errores.RBAC.FamiliaEnUso: The Family cannot be deleted because it is being used by one or more Roles or other Families. Remove those references first.
Errores.RBAC.RolEnUso: The Role cannot be deleted because it is assigned to one or more Users. Change the Role of those users first.
frmGestionarRolesYFamilias.Title: CineGest - Manage Roles and Families
frmGestionarRolesYFamilias.ConfirmarElim: Do you want to delete the selected item? Deletion is permanent. Only allowed if the item is NOT being used by other Families or Roles.
frmGestionarRolesYFamilias.MsgSoloPrimer: You can only remove first-level items from the component being edited. To modify the content of a nested Family, select it from the dropdown and edit it directly.
frmGestionarRolesYFamilias.ConfirmarDesc:
The item you are creating has not been saved yet. If you change selection, it will be discarded.

Do you want to discard it and continue?
frmGestionarRolesYFamilias.ConfirmarElim:
The composition has become empty. Do you want to delete this item? It will be permanently removed from the database. Only allowed if it is NOT being used by other Families or Roles.

If you choose No, the in-memory changes are kept and you can cancel to revert.
frmGestionarRolesYFamilias.MsgNoEliminad: Not deleted. Use 'Cancel' to discard changes, or add at least one item to the composition and save.
